sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.33 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: For$HNN$-exten\-sions of the form$G= < t, A t^{-1}Bt=C, \; \, >$, where$A$is a finitely generated abelian group and$\! : B C$is an isomorphism of two of its subgroups, find a criterion to be residually finite; a criterion to be Hopfian. { Yu.\,I.\,Merzlyakov} a) Such a criterion is found (S.\,Andreadakis, E.\,Raptis, D.\,Varsos, Arch. Math., { 50} (1988), 495--501. b) Such a criterion is found (S....
